free_text: Cross section measurement of alpha particle induced
nuclear reactions on natural cadmium up to 52 MeV
irradiated with 51.2 MeV 50 nA apha particle beam for
1 h. Ti monitor foils 10.9 um were used.
Beam energy was determined by time of flight method.
Gamma spectra were recorded with OERTEC gamma
Decay data were taken from NuDat web database.
The uncertainty on the energy of the front
estimated by taking the square root of the sum in
number of target nuclei and non-uniformity(2%);
to the results of the theoretical model code
to those found in the literature.
